---
title: Nurturing Pipeline
description: Cyclic pipeline for leads that didn't book, with setter/closer model and re-engagement stages.
date: 2026-03-14
tags: hubspot, pipeline, nurturing, follow-up, cyclic, setter, closer, stage-ids

---

# Nurturing Pipeline

> Covers [SS4.4 Mountain-Nurturing Pipeline](../hubspot-pms-sync-spec.md#44-mountain-nurturing-pipeline) of the HubSpot <> PMS Integration Spec.

## Overview

Manages leads that didn't book. These are opportunities that went through the sales process but were lost -- they enter nurturing for long-term follow-up. The pipeline can cycle: a nurtured lead that's lost again creates a NEW nurturing deal.

**Pipeline ID:** `873061385`

## Diagram

```
                      ENTRY (HubSpot Auto-Creates Deal)
    ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    │  CL-Nurturing stage in Reservation, Past Guest,         │
    │  or Nurturing Pipeline                                   │
    │       │                                                  │
    │       ▼  HubSpot automation                              │
    │  New deal created in Nurturing Pipeline                   │
    └───────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                                │
                                ▼
    ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    │  FOLLOW-UP NEEDED  (1308812207)                           │
    │  Lifecycle: Mountain Lead / Mountain Customer             │
    │  Setter chases for call OR deal owner nurtures via SMS    │
    │  Manual: setter_assigned                                  │
    └───────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────┘
                    │
                    │  Meeting scheduled OR
                    │  SDR Upcoming Meeting checked (*)
                    ▼
    ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    │  BOOKED CALL  (1308812208)                                │
    │  Lifecycle: Mountain Opportunity / Mountain Customer       │
    │  HubSpot auto-move                                        │
    │  Contact: sales_meeting_upcoming = true                   │
    └────────┬──────────────────────────────┬───────────────────┘
             │                              │
             │  Call happens                │  No show
             ▼                              ▼
    ┌────────────────────┐     ┌────────────────────────────────┐
    │  QUOTE             │     │  NO SHOW  (1310267548)         │
    │  (1308812209)      │     │  Lifecycle: Mountain           │
    │  Lifecycle:        │     │    Opportunity                 │
    │    Mountain        │     │  Manual move                   │
    │    Opportunity     │     │  Task for setter               │
    │                    │     │       │                         │
    │  PMS: dealstage,   │     │       │  Re-scheduled          │
    │    dates,          │     │       └──────► BOOKED CALL     │
    │    quote_amount,   │     └────────────────────────────────┘
    │    quote_expiry    │
    │  HS: follow-up     │
    │    task 8hr        │
    │  HS: cancel quote  │
    │    if expired       │
    └──┬──┬──┬──┬──┬─────┘
       │  │  │  │  │
       │  │  │  │  │  Quote expired (HS automation)
       │  │  │  │  └──────────► FOLLOW-UP NEEDED / BOOKED CALL
       │  │  │  │
       │  │  │  │  Guest accepts
       │  │  │  └────────────────────────────────────────┐
       │  │  │                                           │
       │  │  │  Blacklisted                              ▼
       │  │  └──────────┐      ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
       │  │             │      │  PENDING APPROVAL               │
       │  │  Not        ▼      │  (1308226889)                   │
       │  │  qualified         │  Lifecycle: Mountain Customer   │
       │  │  ┌──────────────┐  │                                 │
       │  │  │ CL-NOT       │  │  PMS: dealstage,               │
       │  │  │ QUALIFIED    │  │    confirmation_number,         │
       │  │  │ (1308811137) │  │    gross_revenue,               │
       │  │  │ Lifecycle:   │  │    rev_less_taxes,              │
       │  │  │  Mtn Not     │  │    cash_collected, dates, owner │
       │  │  │  Qualified   │  │  HS: admin reconcile task       │
       │  │  │ Manual:      │  └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
       │  │  │ not_qualified │                 │
       │  │  │ _reason      │                  ▼
       │  │  └──────────────┘  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
       │  │                    │  CLOSED WON  (1308812211)       │
       │  │  ┌──────────────┐  │  Lifecycle: Mountain Customer   │
       │  │  │ CL-          │  │                                 │
       │  │  │ BLACKLISTED  │  │  PMS: dealstage, final          │
       │  │  │ (1309340832) │  │    financials                   │
       │  │  │ Lifecycle:   │  │  HS: Creates Upsell deal        │
       │  │  │  Blacklisted │  │  HS: Creates Past Guest deal    │
       │  │  │ Manual:      │  │  HS: Creates Rebooking deal     │
       │  └─►│  do_not_     │  │  HS: 265-day task               │
       │     │  contact     │  └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
       │     └──────────────┘                  │
       │                                       │  Cancel
       │  Lost again                           ▼
       ▼                       ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
    ┌──────────────────────┐   │  CANCELLED  (1308812213)        │
    │  CL-NURTURING        │   │  Lifecycle: Mountain Customer   │
    │  (1308812212)        │   │    / Evangelist                 │
    │  Lifecycle: Mountain │   │                                 │
    │    Opportunity       │   │  PMS: dealstage, refund fields  │
    │                      │   │  HS: moves to Recover Pipeline  │
    │  PMS: dealstage      │   └─────────────────────────────────┘
    │  Manual: loss_reason │
    │  HS: creates NEW     │
    │    Nurturing deal    │
    │    -> Follow-Up      │
    │       Needed OR      │
    │       Booked Call    │
    └──────────────────────┘
```

(*) **SDR Meeting Threshold Discrepancy:** The cheat sheet states "SDR: Upcoming Meeting" triggers when an upcoming meeting is booked within **90 days**. However, the live HubSpot property description for `sales_meeting_upcoming` says **30 days**. The operational threshold needs to be confirmed with the team.

## Key Characteristics

**Cyclic.** A nurtured lead that's lost again at the Quote stage creates a NEW nurturing deal. The cycle can repeat indefinitely. The new deal enters at Follow-Up Needed or Booked Call (per cheat sheet).

**Setter + closer model.** Follow-Up Needed is worked by setters (booking calls) and deal owners (SMS nurturing). Booked Call through Closed Won follows the standard closer flow.

**Expired quotes loop back.** Unlike CL-Nurturing (which creates a new deal), an expired quote moves the SAME deal back to Follow-Up Needed or Booked Call within the Nurturing Pipeline for another attempt.

**Same stage structure as Reservation.** Quote through Closed Won mirrors Reservation Pipeline behavior, just with different stage IDs.

## Stage Detail

| Stage            | ID           | Lifecycle Stage                 | Driver                       | PMS Role                                                |
| ---------------- | ------------ | ------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| Follow-Up Needed | `1308812207` | Mountain Lead / Customer        | HS auto-creates deal here    | None -- setter works the lead                           |
| Booked Call      | `1308812208` | Mountain Opportunity / Customer | HS auto (meeting / SDR flag) | None                                                    |
| No Show          | `1310267548` | Mountain Opportunity            | Staff manual                 | None                                                    |
| Quote            | `1308812209` | Mountain Opportunity            | PMS (`quoted`)               | `dealstage`, dates, `quote_amount`, `quote_expiry_date` |
| CL-Nurturing     | `1308812212` | Mountain Opportunity            | PMS (`nurturing`)            | `dealstage` -- creates new Nurturing deal               |
| CL-Not Qualified | `1308811137` | Mountain Not Qualified          | PMS (`not_qualified`)        | `dealstage`                                             |
| CL-Blacklisted   | `1309340832` | Blacklisted                     | Manual                       | --                                                      |
| Pending Approval | `1308226889` | Mountain Customer               | PMS (`pending_approval`)     | All financial fields, `confirmation_number`             |
| Closed Won       | `1308812211` | Mountain Customer               | PMS (`confirmed`)            | Final financials                                        |
| Cancelled        | `1308812213` | Mountain Customer / Evangelist  | PMS (`cancelled`)            | Refund fields                                           |

## Property Schema Per Stage

### Follow-Up Needed

```
deal.dealstage        = "1308812207"           # set by HS automation on entry
deal.setter_assigned  = <enum>                 # manual — setter working the lead
contact.lifecyclestage = Mountain Lead         # or Mountain Customer if returning
                         | Mountain Customer
```

### Booked Call

```
deal.dealstage                 = "1308812208"  # HS auto-move
contact.sales_meeting_upcoming = true          # triggers the stage transition
contact.lifecyclestage         = Mountain Opportunity
                                 | Mountain Customer
```

### No Show

```
deal.dealstage         = "1310267548"          # manual move by staff
deal.deal_owner        = <owner_id>            # manual
deal.deal_source       = <enum>                # manual
contact.lifecyclestage = Mountain Opportunity
```

### Quote

```
deal.dealstage         = "1308812209"          # PMS writes on quoted status
deal.checkin_date      = <date>                # PMS
deal.checkout_date     = <date>                # PMS
deal.quote_amount      = <number>              # PMS
deal.quote_expiry_date = <date>                # PMS
contact.lifecyclestage = Mountain Opportunity

# HS automations triggered:
#   - Task: follow up with guest (8 hours)
#   - Task: cancel quote in PMS if expired
#         -> expired quote moves deal to Follow-Up Needed / Booked Call
```

### CL-Nurturing

```
deal.dealstage          = "1308812212"         # PMS writes on nurturing status
deal.loss_reason        = <enum>               # manual (Timing, Financials, etc.)
deal.closed_lost_reason = <string>             # manual — free-text detail
contact.lifecyclestage  = Mountain Opportunity

# HS automation triggered:
#   - Creates NEW deal in Nurturing Pipeline
#     at Follow-Up Needed OR Booked Call stage
```

### CL-Not Qualified

```
deal.dealstage           = "1308811137"        # PMS writes on not_qualified status
deal.not_qualified_reason = <enum>             # manual (Physical Restrictions, etc.)
contact.lifecyclestage   = Mountain Not Qualified
```

### CL-Blacklisted

```
deal.dealstage         = "1309340832"          # manual move
contact.do_not_contact = true                  # manual — triggers lifecycle change
contact.lifecyclestage = Blacklisted
```

### Pending Approval

```
deal.dealstage                          = "1308226889"  # PMS
deal.confirmation_number                = <string>      # PMS
deal.gross_revenue                      = <number>      # PMS
deal.revenue_generated_less_taxes__fees = <number>      # PMS
deal.cash_collected                     = <number>      # PMS
deal.checkin_date                       = <date>        # PMS
deal.checkout_date                      = <date>        # PMS
deal.hubspot_owner_id                   = <owner_id>    # PMS (if set)
deal.deal_source                        = <enum>        # manual
deal.closed_won_reason                  = <string>      # manual
contact.lifecyclestage                  = Mountain Customer

# HS automation triggered:
#   - Task: admin reconcile with PMS
```

### Closed Won

```
deal.dealstage         = "1308812211"          # PMS writes on confirmed status
deal.amount            = <number>              # PMS — final financials
deal.gross_revenue     = <number>              # PMS
deal.cash_collected    = <number>              # PMS
contact.lifecyclestage = Mountain Customer

# HS automations triggered:
#   - Creates deal in Upsell Pipeline
#   - Creates deal in Past Guest Pipeline
#   - Creates deal in Rebooking Program Pipeline
#   - Sets 265-day anniversary task for deal owner
```

### Cancelled

```
deal.dealstage                    = "1308812213"  # PMS writes on cancelled status
deal.refund_amount                = <number>      # PMS
deal.cash_collected               = <number>      # PMS (recomputed after refund)
deal.cancel__reschedule_request   = <string>      # manual
deal.cancellationreschedule_reason = <enum>       # manual
deal.refund_noted                 = <bool>        # manual
contact.lifecyclestage            = Mountain Customer | Mountain Evangelist

# HS automation triggered:
#   - Moves deal to Recover Pipeline
```

## Stage ID Comparison: Reservation vs Nurturing

Even though stages share names, the IDs are pipeline-specific. The PMS `HUBSPOT_STAGE_MAP` must use the correct ID for the target pipeline.

| Stage            | Reservation ID | Nurturing ID |
| ---------------- | -------------- | ------------ |
| Booked Call      | `1308814484`   | `1308812208` |
| No Show          | `1310267547`   | `1310267548` |
| Quote            | `1308814486`   | `1308812209` |
| CL-Nurturing     | `1309341807`   | `1308812212` |
| CL-Not Qualified | `1309341808`   | `1308811137` |
| CL-Blacklisted   | `1309341809`   | `1309340832` |
| Pending Approval | `1309405752`   | `1308226889` |
| Closed Won       | `1308814489`   | `1308812211` |
| Cancelled        | `1309341806`   | `1308812213` |

The PMS `HUBSPOT_STAGE_MAP` currently maps `nurturing` -> `1308812207` (Follow-Up Needed). If a nurturing deal progresses to Quote/Pending Approval/Closed Won, the PMS needs to use the **Nurturing Pipeline stage IDs**, not the Reservation ones. This is a consideration for Phase 2 multi-deal support.

## Entry Points

A deal enters the Nurturing Pipeline when HubSpot automation detects CL-Nurturing in any of these pipelines:

| Source Pipeline           | CL-Nurturing Stage ID | New Deal Enters At              |
| ------------------------- | --------------------- | ------------------------------- |
| Mountain-Reservation      | `1309341807`          | Follow-Up Needed or Booked Call |
| Mountain-Past Guest       | `1308814504`          | Follow-Up Needed or Booked Call |
| Mountain-Nurturing (self) | `1308812212`          | Follow-Up Needed or Booked Call |

## Exit Points

| Exit Stage       | Lifecycle at Exit              | Where They Go                                 |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------- |
| CL-Nurturing     | Mountain Opportunity           | New deal in Nurturing Pipeline (cycle)        |
| CL-Not Qualified | Mountain Not Qualified         | Terminal                                      |
| CL-Blacklisted   | Blacklisted                    | Terminal                                      |
| Closed Won       | Mountain Customer              | Upsell + Past Guest + Rebooking deals created |
| Cancelled        | Mountain Customer / Evangelist | Recover Pipeline                              |
